text:
Source: Company Policy

COMPANY POLICY DOCUMENT
-----------------------
This document outlines policies regarding high-risk customer requests at ABC Technologies:

Source: Company Policy

1. Refund Policy
- Customers are eligible for a full refund on annual subscriptions if requested within 30 days of the purchase date.
- Refunds requested after 30 days are generally not allowed except under extreme circumstances.
- All refund requests must be routed to the Billing department.
- CRITICAL: All refund requests require explicit review and approval by a human supervisor. They cannot be auto-approved.

Source: Company Policy

2. Subscription Cancellation Policy
- Customers can cancel their subscription at any time.
- Upon cancellation, the subscription remains active until the end of the current billing cycle. No partial refunds are issued for unused days.
- CRITICAL: Subscription cancellation requests require human supervisor review and approval before final confirmation.

Source: Company Policy

3. Account Closure Policy
- Customers can request permanent closure of their account.
- This action is irreversible and will delete all stored business data within 14 business days.
- CRITICAL: Account closure requests must be validated and approved by a human supervisor to prevent accidental data loss.

Source: Company Policy

4. Compensation Policy
- If a customer experiences billing errors or system downtime, support representatives can issue compensation (billing credit) up to a maximum of $50.
- CRITICAL: Any compensation request must be reviewed and approved by a human supervisor.

Source: Company Policy

5. Escalation to Management
- If a customer is highly dissatisfied and requests escalation to management, the ticket must be flagged.
- CRITICAL: Escalations to management must be approved by a human supervisor before being assigned to a manager.

Source: Faq

FAQ DOCUMENT
------------
Frequently Asked Questions by customers of ABC Technologies:

Source: Faq

Q: How do I reset my password?
A: You can reset your password by clicking on the "Forgot Password" link on the login screen. Alternatively, if you are logged in, go to Settings > Security > Reset Password in the application dashboard. Follow the instructions sent to your registered email address.

Source: Faq

Q: What payment methods do you support?
A: We support all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and direct bank transfers for Enterprise customers.

Source: Faq

Q: How do I change my profile information?
A: Go to Settings > Profile, update your details (name, email, organization), and click "Save Changes".

Source: Faq

Q: Can I reactivate my account after deactivation?
A: Yes, if you deactivated your account, you can reactivate it by logging in with your old credentials and clicking "Activate Account" or by contacting Account Support.

Source: Faq

Q: How can I request a refund?
A: To request a refund, please contact billing support. Refunds are subject to our 30-day refund policy and require supervisor approval.

Source: Pricing Guide

PRICING GUIDE
-------------------
ABC Technologies offers the following pricing plans for our cloud-based business management software:

Source: Pricing Guide

1. Basic Plan
- Price: $29 per month (billed monthly).
- Target Audience: Small businesses, solo entrepreneurs.
- Features: Core business tracking, single-user access, basic dashboard, email support.
- Limitations: No integrations, no advanced reporting.

Source: Pricing Guide

2. Professional Plan
- Price: $79 per month (billed monthly).
- Target Audience: Growing businesses.
- Features: Advanced reporting, multi-user access (up to 5 users), software integrations (CRM, Slack, QuickBooks), priority email support.

Source: Pricing Guide

3. Enterprise Plan
- Price: $199 per month (billed monthly).
- Target Audience: Large organizations.
- Features: Custom support channel, unlimited users, dedicated account manager, API access, 99.9% uptime SLA guarantees.

Source: Technical Manual

TECHNICAL MANUAL
----------------
ABC Technologies Technical Troubleshooting and Manual:

Source: Technical Manual

1. Application Crashes on File Upload
- Issue: The application crashes or throws an out-of-memory error when uploading files.
- Cause: The file size exceeds the maximum limit or has an incorrect format.
- Solution: 
  - Ensure the uploaded file is within the 10MB limit. Files larger than 10MB will cause application crashes due to memory allocation limits.
  - Accepted file formats are PDF, PNG, JPG, and CSV.
  - For CSV files, ensure the encoding is UTF-8. Other encodings may lead to crashes during file parsing.

Source: Technical Manual

2. Installation Issues
- Ensure system meets minimum requirements: Node.js v18+, Python 3.10+, and at least 8GB RAM.
- Clean application cache and run clean install command: "npm run clean-install".

Source: Technical Manual

3. Configuration Errors
- Check that the database connection string in your .env config is correct.
- If you see "Unauthorized Access" errors, check if the session token secret key has expired in config.env.
